description: Scale the Flask API service in '/home/ga/scaling-app/' to run exactly 3 replicas behind the Nginx load balancer. Ensure the service configuration supports multiple replicas without naming or port conflicts and that the Nginx configuration properly distributes requests across all instances. Save the output of 10 sequential curl requests to http://localhost:8080 to '/home/ga/scaling-app/verification.txt' to verify that requests are being handled by different container hostnames.
